item.title: Article Words
item.description:
实践, 区块链技术在真实世界的用例

Practical, Real-World Use Cases of Blockchain Technology

在操作与猜测之外

Beyond the hype and speculation

有哪些确切问题在今天正在使用区块链解决

what are the tangible problems that blockchain technology is solving today?

这课程探索其实践，区块链在真实世界中的应用

This lesson explores the practical, real-world applications of blockchains

从数字货币等基本概念转向去中心化治理和数字所有权等革命性的理念。

moving from foundational concepts like digital money to revolutionary ideas like decentralized governance and digital ownership.

区块链的关键应用：从数字货币到智能合约

Key Blockchain Applications: From Digital Money to Smart Contracts

可分解为一些

can be broken down into several
